summary: Asset battery50 showed high_voltage, high_temperature, high_current during cycle 12. The observed window lasted 37496 seconds with severity 6.00.

evidence.text: Minimum observed voltage reached 4.72 V during the incident window.
Peak observed temperature reached 108.03 C during the incident window.
Peak absolute current reached 19.92 A during the incident window.
The incident window persisted for 37496 seconds.
The incident window contains 38703 recorded samples.

recommended_tests: Repeat a reference charge-discharge cycle to benchmark capacity drift.
Inspect thermistor placement and repeat the cycle with thermal logging.
Verify current sensing calibration and repeat a stepped load test.
Check charger regulation and confirm the constant-voltage transition.
confidence_caveats: The report is deterministic and the confidence score is heuristic, based on baseline models plus nearest-neighbor retrieval.
